description_long: This handbag features a boxy, rectangular structure with a sloped, triangular top, reminiscent of a small carry case or organizer. The exterior is predominantly white with black Arabic script printed on the front, sides, and top surfaces, giving it a distinctive and culturally specific appearance. A single, sturdy black handle is attached to the top, designed for easy carrying by hand. The front and back panels are partially transparent, revealing internal compartments or dividers, suggesting the bag is intended for organized storage or display of items. The overall construction appears to be rigid, likely made from plastic or acrylic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. There are no visible decorative elements aside from the printed text, and the closure mechanism is not clearly visible but may be integrated into the top panel.
description: A rigid, white rectangular handbag with a black handle, transparent panels, and Arabic script printed on multiple sides. The bag features internal compartments and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular sloped top and the solid white side panel with Arabic script.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black handle, transparent front panel, and prominent Arabic script across the front.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar triangular profile and visible Arabic script on the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the black handle, transparent back panel, and additional Arabic script, with internal compartments visible.
attribute_strap_type: single short handle, rigid, non-adjustable, attached at the top center
attribute_closure_mechanism: Not clearly visible; likely a hinged or slotted closure integrated into the top panel
attribute_pattern: Arabic script text printed on multiple panels
